projectDescription: A lightweight, type-safe fetch wrapper with essential features like retries, interceptors, request deduplication, and schema validation.
keyFeatures: Request Deduplication - Automatically eliminates duplicate requests and prevents race conditions
Smart Response Parsing - Auto-detects and parses responses based on Content-Type headers
Error Handling - Structured error types (HTTPError, ValidationError) with detailed context
Retries - Configurable retry strategies with exponential and linear backoff
Schema Validation - Type-safe runtime validation using Standard Schema compatible libraries
Hooks System - Lifecycle hooks for request, response, error, and stream events
Plugins - Extensible plugin system with setup, hooks, and middleware support
URL Helpers - Dynamic URL parameters, query strings, and method prefixes
Authorization - Built-in auth helpers for Bearer, Basic, and custom schemes
Middlewares - Request and response middleware for custom processing
Timeout Support - Per-request and global timeout configuration
TypeScript First - Full type inference and safety throughout
publicApiSurface: callApi(url, options?) - Simple fetch wrapper with enhanced features
createFetchClientWithContext<TContext>() - Create client with custom context type
defineSchema(schema) - Define route schemas for validation
HTTPError - HTTP error class with status and response data
isHTTPError(error) - Type guard for HTTP errors
isValidationError(error) - Type guard for validation errors
